facts.descriptor.script: first script_block without setup -> VueSfcDescriptor.script: VueSfcBlock(content, start_offset, start_line) -> Fact(payload.content, payload.start_offset, payload.start_line)
facts.descriptor.script_setup: first script_block with setup -> VueSfcDescriptor.script_setup: VueSfcBlock(content, start_offset, start_line) -> Fact(payload.content, payload.start_offset, payload.start_line)
facts.script.embedded: script content with lang js ts jsx tsx -> embedded script scope(content, start_line, lang) -> Fact(payload.content, payload.lang, payload.tsx, payload.start_offset, payload.start_line)

recovery.descriptor.blocks: preserve well-formed blocks around malformed blocks
recovery.embedded.skip: skip script languages outside js ts jsx tsx
recovery.missing.close: consume until eof for current block

spans.block.content: source byte range inside start and end tags
spans.embedded.offset: block content start line and byte offset

facts.directive.class: directive_name prefix -> bind event slot model control custom
facts.template.directive: directive -> VueFacts.template_directive_count + VueFacts.template_directives: VueTemplateDirectiveFact(name, class, span, line)
facts.template.element: start_tag -> VueFacts.template_element_count + VueFacts.template_elements: VueTemplateElementFact(name, span, line)
facts.template.expression: interpolation | directive_expression | dynamic_argument -> VueFacts.template_expression_count + VueFacts.template_expressions: VueTemplateExpressionFact(span, line)

recovery.missing.interpolation: close at next tag or eof
recovery.v_pre: keep raw text and skip expression validation

spans.host.range: template block start offset + node range
